message:
test(unit): expand mcp.rs (88→139) inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 51 new tests covering: map_mcp_error/map_caut_error/map_cass_error
branches, McpToolError constructors, reservation_to_mcp_info states,
IpcPaneState deserialization, resolve_alt_screen_state edge cases,
McpPaneState from_pane_info + serialization, struct serialization for
McpSearchHit/McpWorkflowItem/McpRuleItem/McpWaitForData/McpEventsData/
McpWorkflowRunData/McpGetTextData/TruncationInfo, builtin_workflows count,
Params deserialization, approval_command, and constants validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
